“Access Labs is proud to have Magna as a partner. There are loads of variables to take into account when launching a token. Magna's platform gives you peace of mind knowing that team and investor token allocations are both secure, and easily managed.

Magna doesn't just provide a platform, but an end to end white glove service, letting your team focus on other key tasks necessary for a smooth launch.”

Andreas Nicolos

CEO @ Access Protocol

PLATFORM

Get started with Magna at any stage.

Stay compliant, track your transactions, and automate your tax withholdings to create the perfect token operations system.

Live Token Distribution

Distribute tokens to investors and employees securely on autopilot with Magna’s audited smart contracts.

Pre-Launch Management

Manage your legal agreements (SAFTs, token warrants, token grants) and communicate the value of your future token.

Supporting

Find us on-chain, any chain.

Magna is live on Solana, Ethereum, Avlanche, Canto, Polygon, Binance, Arbitrum, Aptos, and Base this year.

Don’t see your chain? Reach out.

... and more

We’re always adding new features to support the largest, fastest-growing, most ambitious projects.

Custom Vesting Schedules

We have flexible supports for cliffs, daily vesting, monthly vesting, and multi-period schedules. Our software can easily support your most complex case. Milestone-based vesting coming soon.

Claim Portal

An intuitive claim portal in your project’s branding where your stakeholders can support your project and claim their unlocked tokens.

Employee & Investor Dashboards

Investors and employees can manage their token holdings, vesting progress, and signed agreements in their personal portals.

Multi-Signature Support

Full control over every on-chain action with custom action permissioning, through integrations with Gnosis Safe, Squads, and other wallet providers.

NEW

Tax Withholding & Compliance

Integrate with HRIS tools to calculate and withhold taxes on token distributions.

NEW
Coming Soon

Custodian Integrations

Rely on institutional custody through Fireblocks, Anchorage, and other industry leaders.

Access the leading token management platform today.

The blockchain moves fast. You can move faster.
